title: Tubella vagans
taxonomy: Tubella vagans is a species of fungus in the family Tubellaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota and is classified as a lichenicolous fungus. The classification of Tubella vagans is further categorized into the genus Tubella and the species T. vagans. This fungus is known to be parasitic, infecting other fungi, particularly lichens. Further research is required to fully understand the classification and relationships within the Tubella vagans species.
